place_name: İBTİSEME TOUR İÇ VE DIŞ TİC.LTD.ŞTİ

reviews.author: حنين الماضي
reviews.text: This travel agency is absolutely fantastic in every way. I've been dealing with them since 2023. Their prices are affordable, their service is excellent, and their customer service is top-notch. Honestly, they treat their clients with sincerity and dedication. I highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Yasemin Fansa
reviews.text: A very honest, reliable and very clean tourism company 🫶🏻

reviews.author: Abotala AiiA
reviews.text: Abu Melissa, the owner of the company, is a very trustworthy and respectable man. We have been dealing with him for years.

reviews.author: ÜSAME AK
reviews.text: True to its name, Ebtisama Tourism Company is distinguished by providing all tourism services according to international standards, serving tourists safely, at the most affordable prices, and with high-quality work. I recommend everyone to deal with this company for all tourism-related matters, from tours and hotel services to flight bookings.
